string.description: Unicode text enclosed in double quotes with backslash escape sequences

number.description: Numeric literal, integer or floating-point, no NaN/Infinity/hex/octal

boolean.description: Boolean literal, exactly true or false without quotes

null.description: Represents an empty or missing value, the only null-like value in JSON

object.description: Unordered collection of key-value pairs where keys must be strings

array.description: Ordered sequence of zero or more values of any JSON type
